sourcesContent:
import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react" import Navbar from "../components/Navbar" import API from "../api/axios" export default function OwnerDashboard() { const [dashboard, setDashboard] = useState({ restaurant_count: 0, total_reviews: 0, avg_rating_overall: 0, recent_reviews: [] }) const [filterText, setFilterText] = useState("") const [filterRating, setFilterRating] = useState("") useEffect(() => { API.get("/owners/me/dashboard") .then((res) => setDashboard(res.data || { restaurant_count: 0, total_reviews: 0, avg_rating_overall: 0, recent_reviews: [] })) .catch(() => setDashboard({ restaurant_count: 0, total_reviews: 0, avg_rating_overall: 0, recent_reviews: [] })) }, []) const filteredReviews = useMemo(() => { return (dashboard.recent_reviews || []).filter((review) => { const textMatch = !filterText || String(review.restaurant_id).includes(filterText) || (review.comment || "").toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase()) const ratingMatch = !filterRating || String(review.rating) === String(filterRating) return textMatch && ratingMatch }) }, [dashboard, filterText, filterRating]) return (

{dashboard.restaurant_count}

Claimed Restaurants

{dashboard.total_reviews}

Total Reviews

{Number(dashboard.avg_rating_overall || 0).toFixed(1)}

Average Rating

Recent Reviews

setFilterText(e.target.value)} />
{filteredReviews.length === 0 &&

No reviews found.

} {filteredReviews.map((review) => (

Restaurant #{review.restaurant_id}

{new Date(review.review_date).toLocaleString()}

Rating: {review.rating}/5

{review.comment || "No comment"}

))}
) }
